name: 11ai-benchmarks
description: Create and operate reproducible AI-coding benchmarks through immutable async cycles: mode-aware creators and runner, frozen machine-readable rubrics, opt-in static content, mechanical audits, sequential blind AI and human judges with deterministic aggregation, exhaustive granular token/cost accounting across benchmark, judge, identified, unidentified, and total scopes, reviewed reports, cross-benchmark analysis, and recursive data-rich benchmark websites.
